notes: Initial release. Multi-framework garage & impound system (ESX / QBCore / Qbox) with a React + Tailwind UI - personal, job, gang, impound and private garages, an in-game admin garage editor with import/export, police impound flow with lots/fees/timers, vehicle transfers, sharing, selling, renaming and pins, persistent damage/mods/mileage, and auto-detected fuel, keys, notify, banking and target integrations.
